question_title: How much Botox do I need for my forehead?
question_text: I am new to Botox and not sure how many units I need for forehead lines. I do not want to look frozen.
answer_text: The right dose depends on muscle strength and your goal. Most patients need 10 to 20 units for the forehead alone. I start conservative at 10 to 12 units and we can add more at your 2-week follow-up.

question_title: Russian lips vs natural technique: which is right for me?
question_text: I want fuller lips but I am scared they will look fake. What is the difference between the Russian technique and classic filler?
answer_text: The Russian technique builds vertical height and a defined cupid's bow. Classic filler adds projection and a fuller look. Which is right depends on your lip shape and goal. I show patients photo references during consultation so we align before I inject anything.
